title: Morgan Stanley Sees Big Upside In WULF After Bitcoin Miners Pivot To AI Data Centers
text: Morgan Stanley identified significant upside potential in TeraWulf (WULF) following the company's strategic pivot from Bitcoin mining to AI and HPC data center services. The analyst report highlighted that TeraWulf is among several Bitcoin miners making the transition to AI infrastructure providers, with Morgan Stanley seeing structural tailwinds from the shift. The report noted that as the company successfully secures long-term, contracted HPC leases at premium rates, it will transition to a more stable revenue model compared to the volatility of cryptocurrency mining. Morgan Stanley's analysis pointed to terawulf's competitive advantages including low-cost power infrastructure, existing facilities that can be repurposed, and strategic locations in areas with strong power supply. The firm's positive outlook reflects growing investor confidence in companies that successfully execute the pivot from mining to AI compute infrastructure.
